canvasTabs.label: Opportunities
canvasTabs.description: Ranked parcel list with Green/Yellow/Red verdicts, verdict-coded map markers, per-row cost-to-go-deeper, and one-click W-002 handoff on Green/Yellow rows

canvasTabs.label: Historical
canvasTabs.description: Title chain, assessor history, prior sales, and staleness flags for the selected parcel — with parcel boundary map and Street View

canvasTabs.label: Feasibility
canvasTabs.description: Single-parcel verdict card with named blocker, underwriting inputs, GIS overlay flags (flood/coastal/historic/OZ), and action buttons
